channel.title: 房贷计算器 on Timetombs
channel.description: Recent content in 房贷计算器 on Timetombs

item.title: [工具] 房贷计算器
item.description: 参数区域 贷款总额 月数   正序 利率 首次还款 提前还款   缩短年限 结果区域-总和 还款方式 年限 总金额 本金 总利息 等额本金 {{result.sum.year}}{{result.sum.ahead.year}} {{result.sum.avgPrincipal.total | CNY}}{{result.sum.ahead.avgPrincipal.total | CNY}} {{result.sum.avgPrincipal.principal | CNY}}{{result.sum.ahead.avgPrincipal.principal | CNY}} {{result.sum.avgPrincipal.interest | CNY}}{{result.sum.ahead.avgPrincipal.interest | CNY}} 等额本息 {{result.sum.year}}{{result.sum.ahead.year}} {{result.sum.avgInterest.total | CNY}}{{result.sum.ahead.avgInterest.total | CNY}} {{result.sum.avgPrincipal.principal | CNY}}{{result.sum.ahead.avgInterest.principal | CNY}} {{result.sum.avgInterest.interest | CNY}}{{result.sum.ahead.avgInterest.interest | CNY}} 差额 {{result.sum.interestDiff | CNY}}{{result.sum.ahead.interestDiff | CNY}} 结果区域-月列表 月份 等额本金 等额本息 总额 本金 利息 剩余本金 总额 本金 利息 剩余本金 {{month.month}} {{month.avgPrincipal.amount | CNY}}{{month.ahead.avgPrincipal.amount}} {{month.avgPrincipal.principal | CNY}}{{month.ahead.avgPrincipal.principal}} {{month.avgPrincipal.interest | CNY}}{{month.ahead.avgPrincipal.interest}} {{month.avgPrincipal.principalBalance | CNY}}{{month.ahead.avgPrincipal.principalBalance}} {{month.avgInterest.amount | CNY}}{{month.ahead.avgInterest.amount}} {{month.avgInterest.principal | CNY}}{{month.ahead.avgInterest.principal}} {{month.avgInterest.interest | CNY}}{{month.ahead.avgInterest.interest}} {{month.avgInterest.principalBalance | CNY}}{{month.ahead.avgInterest.principalBalance}}
